---
title: "Command Line Basics"
author: "Darius HUISMAN"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is a document used to test and learn different commands and understand their outputs, such as "ls",  "cd" and "pwd".
